programs.title: American Underdog
programs.desc: The inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who overcomes years of challenges and setbacks to become a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. Just when his dreams seem all but out of reach, it's only with the support of his wife, Brenda, and the encouragement of his family, coaches and teammates that Warner perseveres and finds the strength to show the world the champion that he already is.

programs.title: The Last Thing She Said
programs.desc: A young woman befriends an elderly cleaning lady who works in her corporate office. However, their relationship soon turns uneasy, then dangerous, when she rejects a date request from the woman's awkward, middle-aged son.

programs.title: The Boy That Never Was
programs.desc: Robin's behaviour grows more mysterious when she begins to search a woman called Eva Doyle online.

programs.title: Fog of War
programs.desc: At the height of WWII, a couple stranded on a remote estate become aware of a Nazi spy hiding among them. Unsure who to trust, they must uncover the spy's identity as the outcome of the war hangs precariously in the balance.
